mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_ai_result (post_id, task_type, status, attempt_count) VALUES (#{postId}, #{taskType}, 'PENDING', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'PENDING', result_json = NULL, error_message = NULL, review_action = NULL, reviewed_by = NULL, reviewed_at = NULL, completed_at = NULL, created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, attempt_count = attempt_count + 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post_ai_result SET status = 'COMPLETED', result_json = #{resultJson}, model = #{model}, error_message = NULL, completed_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND task_type = #{taskType}
UPDATE post_ai_result SET status = 'UNMODERATED', result_json = NULL, model = #{model}, error_message = #{reason}, completed_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND task_type = #{taskType}
mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, task_type, status, result_json, model, error_message, attempt_count, review_action, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, completed_at FROM post_ai_result WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND task_type = #{taskType}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_ai_result ar JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = ar.post_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND ar.task_type = 'IMAGE_MODERATION' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' AND ar.completed_at >= #{since} AND JSON_LENGTH(ar.result_json, '$.flagged') > 0

SELECT cp.id AS post_id, cp.title, cp.content, cp.category AS post_category, cp.status AS post_status, cp.is_anonymous AS anonymous, cp.user_id AS author_id, u.name AS author_name, ar.result_json, ar.model, ar.attempt_count, ar.status AS ai_status, cp.created_at, ar.completed_at FROM post_ai_result ar JOIN community_post cp ON ar.post_id = cp.id LEFT JOIN users u ON cp.user_id = u.id WHERE ar.task_type = 'MODERATION' AND ar.post_id = #{postId}

SELECT cp.id AS post_id, cp.title, cp.content, cp.is_anonymous AS anonymous, cp.category AS post_category, u.name AS author_name, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.category')) AS ai_category, CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.confidence')) AS DECIMAL(10,6)) AS confidence, cp.created_at, ar.completed_at FROM post_ai_result ar JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = ar.post_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.user_id WHERE ar.task_type = 'MODERATION' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' AND ar.review_action IS NULL AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND ar.result_json IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.toxic') = TRUE AND JSON_TYPE(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.confidence')) IN ('INTEGER', 'DOUBLE', 'DECIMAL') AND CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.confidence')) AS DECIMAL(10,6)) < #{hideThreshold} ORDER BY ar.completed_at ASC, cp.created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_ai_result ar JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = ar.post_id WHERE ar.task_type = 'MODERATION' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' AND ar.review_action IS NULL AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND ar.result_json IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.toxic') = TRUE AND JSON_TYPE(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.confidence')) IN ('INTEGER', 'DOUBLE', 'DECIMAL') AND CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.confidence')) AS DECIMAL(10,6)) < #{hideThreshold}
mapper.update: UPDATE post_ai_result ar JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = ar.post_id SET ar.review_action = #{action}, ar.reviewed_by = #{reviewerId}, ar.reviewed_at = NOW() WHERE ar.post_id = #{postId} AND ar.task_type = 'MODERATION' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' AND ar.review_action IS NULL AND cp.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND ar.result_json IS NOT NULL AND JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.toxic') = TRUE AND JSON_TYPE(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.confidence')) IN ('INTEGER', 'DOUBLE', 'DECIMAL') AND CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.confidence')) AS DECIMAL(10,6)) < #{hideThreshold}
mapper.select: SELECT review_action FROM post_ai_result WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND task_type = 'MODERATION'

SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ar.result_json, '$.category')) AS category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM post_ai_result ar WHERE ar.task_type = 'MODERATION' AND ar.status = 'COMPLETED' AND ar.result_json IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category
